ksa_text: Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission grants, access reviews, privilege escalation procedures, and enforcement of least-privilege principles across data assets.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

top_anchors.element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: task maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data platform", "data asset"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4131); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in DE job postings or cert curricula (AWS DE, Databricks, dbt, GCP DE). Would a working Data Engineer self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the technical practice is implicit in DE work (domain affinity 0.60, 2 DE signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching underrepresents many legitimate DE competencies.
